{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Sculpt the Soul
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Sculpt the Soul]] is a technique used by [[Charity]] to create [[Silver]] Hearts.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
